sub_fields.message: *Elite websites contain +1000 words per page. The more information you provide about each service the better so our copywriters can create personalized content that adds value to the website.

Introduce Yourself

“Hi Mr. Customer! My name is X and I’m your Onboarding Specialist from Olly Olly. How’s your day going so far?”

* build rapport / small talk *

Set the Stage

“Well great, let’s jump in! I will be your onboarding specialist and point of contact for the next 3 weeks. After we get your campaign set up for success and launched, I will be introducing you to your dedicated account manager.

This specialist will be with you for the lifetime of your campaign. Their responsibility is to advise on best-in-class digital strategies and assist in any tweaks or updates to your campaign you may have down the road.”

Set the Agenda - Campaign Setup | App | Website | Housekeeping

“On this 45 min call, we are going to be discussing the important details our team needs in order to set your campaign up for success here at Olly Olly. I’m SO excited to start working with you.

Today, we are going to review your Google Business Profile, ensure you’re set up in the Olly Olly app so you can begin reaping the benefits and value it brings, review the initial build of your website, and close it out with some housekeeping and next steps.”

Our Goal

“Our goal is to make sure you see the best results possible on Google. Google is all about trust so it can take anywhere from 4–6 months to build that trust with Google and start seeing results.

In that time, our team will be actively optimizing your website and campaign to ensure you not only get results, but you get quality results.

In the meantime, there’s a lot that you can do on your end to fast-track those quality results that we will get to shortly!

Build Rapport

“Before we dig in, I’d love to get to know a little more about you and your business! In talking with the SALES REP, they let me know X, X and X. I would love to hear a little more from you!”

sub_fields.label: What got you started in your industry and how long have you been in business for?
sub_fields.name: what_got_you_started_in_your_industry_and_how_long_have_you_been_in_business_for

sub_fields.label: How does your business make a difference or impact your customers?
sub_fields.name: how_does_your_business_make_a_difference_or_impact_your_customers

sub_fields.label: What really sets you apart from your competition?
sub_fields.name: what_really_sets_you_apart_from_your_competition

sub_fields.message:
Great to hear! Earlier I mentioned that there were some things you could do on your end to fast track your results. I’ve done a little digging and see that you DO or DO NOT have a Google Business Profile. Your Google Business Profile, which I may refer to a few times as a GBP, is CRUCIAL in dominating your local Google results. I’m sure you’re seen one before. In looking up a business on Google, there is a “card” that appears on the right side of your screen - that is a Google Business Profile. It’s like an online business card for your business! It contains important details such as your hours of operation, links to your website, showcases photos of your work, and - most importantly - it’s a place for your customers to leave positive reviews about their experience with your business! Reviews are SO important to your online success.

Your GBP is responsible for over 30% of your ranking power! What my team wants to do is 1. Make sure we have access/ create this for you and 2, make sure that it is complete and optimized. By doing this, customers are 70% more likely to visit and 50% more likely to consider your company.

sub_fields.label: Did you walk the client through obtaining GBP access and/or creating a GBP?
sub_fields.name: did_you_walk_the_client_through_obtaining_gbp_access_andor_creating_a_gbp

sub_fields.label: Please share a link to their GBP
sub_fields.name: please_share_a_link_to_their_gbp:

sub_fields.label: Are there any duplicate listings?
sub_fields.name: are_there_any_duplicate_listings

sub_fields.label: Please provide a link below
sub_fields.name: please_provide_a_link_below

sub_fields.label: GBP Name:
sub_fields.name: gbp_name:

sub_fields.message: Amazing! Now that we have that piece of the puzzle, I can introduce you to our Olly Olly app. Utilizing our app is imperative in skyrocketing those online results! Within the app, you can request and respond to your GBP reviews utilizing AI, upload and schedule posts for your GBP and Social Media profiles, and you will have access to your leads and campaign results - tracking your progress every step of the way. Before we jump in, I want to first ensure that you already received an invite for the Olly Olly app.

sub_fields.label: Did the client log into the app with you on the phone?
sub_fields.name: did_the_client_log_into_the_app_with_you_on_the_phone

sub_fields.label: Were you able to connect their GBP to the app?
sub_fields.name: were_you_able_to_connect_their_gbp_to_the_app

sub_fields.message: Social media is a great way to get in front of potential clients and showcase your best work. Social media is no longer just for scrolling – it’s where customers search for trusted services, read reviews and make decisions. After our call, I’ll share a link to our SEO Guide if you’d like to take a look and read a little more about what we do, but in the meantime I would love to get your SM profile attached to our app so you can start utilizing the scheduling feature. I did a little research and found X profiles. (If the client does not have a SM profile, walk them through setting this up)

sub_fields.label: Were you able to link the client’s SM account to the app?
sub_fields.name: were_you_able_to_link_the_client’s_sm_account_to_the_app

sub_fields.message:
Fantastic! Now that we have you all set up for success in the Olly Olly App, I’d love to chat about your website.

IF THE CLIENT HAS AN EXISTING WEBSITE

X from sales shared your previous website with me. In looking through this website, I believe we can migrate over a few existing pages, but I’d love to use this as a foundation to build on. We want to ensure your website is set up for success on Google.

sub_fields.label: What pages are we migrating over from the client’s current website, if any?
sub_fields.name: design_group_current_previous_site
sub_fields.instructions: Remember, YOU are the expert here. Advise the client what will have the best impact on their online presence.

sub_fields.message:
IF THE CLIENT DOES NOT HAVE AN EXISTING WEBSITE

X from sales let me know that you do not have a previous website. I’m so excited to be able to get this set up for you!

It is imperative that we build your website in a way that aligns with Google's best practices. We want to make sure that the services we feature are services that your potential clients are searching for! Speaking of potential clients, what would you say your target audience is?

sub_fields.message: I feel like we have a really great foundation built that aligns with Google’s best practices. That being said, we now want to put that personal touch on your website and build trust with potential clients. One of the best ways to do this is having a great About Us page and making sure the website aligns with your tone and branding.

sub_fields.message:
As I mentioned earlier, reviews are imperative to your success on Google. We will be linking the app to your GBP for customer reviews.

I see you have some great ones already! I would love to highlight your 5 star reviews on your homepage

- OR -

I see you do not have any yet. Reminder to use the app to ask for reviews from your past clients! This is a great trust signal I’d love to feature on your website in the future.

sub_fields.instructions: Reminder we will only pull 5 star reviews.

I see that you DO or DO NOT already have a domain purchased. It looks like it was purchased with X. Do you have logins available for this domain? If the client does not have a domain, offer to purchase one.

sub_fields.message:
If we can not get access to the client’s primary domain:

No problem Mr. Customer, I will be reaching out to you every couple days so we can work on obtaining access to your primary domain. If we are unable to get access, we can purchase an alternate domain at no additional cost to you so we can start getting your website live and have Google start the initial crawl process.

sub_fields.message: Alright! I have everything I need to get your campaign started. Here’s what the next few weeks are going to look like. I am going to share all of this information with my internal team of experts. They are going to work on the build of your website, ensuring all of the information we talked about today is implemented and you are set up for success on Google. This process takes about 3 weeks, but do not worry - I will keep you looped in every step of the way. Typically, I call my clients every 2 business days to check in. I always want to over communicate in case there are any questions you may have! Do phone calls work best for you? If not, I can always email or text.

sub_fields.label: What is the client’s preferred method of communication for their campaign
sub_fields.name: what_is_the_client’s_preferred_method_of_communication_for_their_campaign

sub_fields.label: What day/ time are you calling the client in 2 business days?
sub_fields.name: what_day_time_are_you_calling_the_client_in_2_business_days

sub_fields.message:
When your website is ready for review, I will give you a call. I will share the website and we will walk through the build. Reminder, we are building this website for Google. There are going to be a lot of mentions of your CITY and STATE throughout the content of your website. This is what Google needs to see in order to show your website and services to the right people at the right place. Once we review your website, we will go ahead and launch it , then I will introduce you to your dedicated account manager who will be with you for the lifetime of your campaign. Do you have any questions for me?

Great! I will send an email with my contact information and any of the outstanding items we discussed today. I will be in touch with you via PREFERRED CONTACT METHOD on X day. Is there a time of day that works best for you? If you need anything, please feel free to call or text me. There will be a link in the signature of my email if you’d like to book some time on my calendar if you need me as well. It was a pleasure speaking with you today and getting to know more about your business. We appreciate you choosing Olly Olly! Have a great day!
